title: Invalid filter format error in NocoDB node
symptom: When using nested logic with `~or` and `~and` in a NocoDB filter, an 'invalid filter format' error is thrown.
root_cause: NocoDB requires complex nested logic expressions to be prefixed with `@` to be recognized as valid. Without this prefix, the filter format is deemed invalid.
fix_steps: Prefix the entire filter expression with `@`
Re-run the NocoDB get many node with the updated filter
agent_instruction: Add `@` before your nested filter expression in the NocoDB node.
